summary: M0 re-review resolves seven of eight prior findings, including governance schemas, doctor rows, performance contracts and 3% arithmetic, corpus invariants, acquisition identity, and acyclic gate order. READY remains blocked by one carried resource-outcome reconciliation defect and one new-in-rework defect: the excluded final secret-scan manifest can retain unscanned attacker-derived path/source strings. No user clarification is required.
